verses.text: Babylon kumpi Nebukhadnezzar in a zawhna gam panin Babylon-ah salin a lakte sung panin hih mite Jerusalem leh Judah-ah a ciahkikte hi a, amau' khua ciatah a ciah uh ahi hi
Zerubbabel, Jeshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaiah, Mordekai, Bilshan, Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum, leh Baanah-te makai-in tua mite a ciahpih uh hi. Israel mi phazahte
Parosh suante — tul nih za khat sawmsagihlenih ahi hi
Shefatiah suante — za thum sawmsagihlenih ahi hi
Arah suante — za sagih sawmsagihlenga ahi hi
Pahathmoab beh sung panin Jeshua leh Joab suante — tul nih za giat sawmlenih ahi hi
Elam suante — tul khat za nih sawmngaleli ahi hi
Zattu suante — za kua sawmlilenga ahi hi
Zakkai suante — za sagih sawmguk ahi hi
Bani suante — za guk sawmlilenih ahi hi
Bebai suante — za guk sawmnihlethum ahi hi
Azgad suante — tul khat za nih sawmnihlenih ahi hi
Adonikam suante — za guk sawmgukleguk ahi hi
Bigvai suante — tul nih sawmngaleguk ahi hi
Adin suante — za li sawmngaleli ahi hi
Ater a kici Hezekiah suante — sawmkualegiat ahi hi
Bezai suante — za thum sawmnihlethum ahi hi
Jorah suante — za khat sawmnihlenih ahi hi
Hashum suante — za nih sawmnihlethum ahi hi
Gibbar suante — sawmkualenga ahi hi
Bethlehem khuami — za khat sawmnihlethum ahi hi
Netofah khuami — sawmngaleguk ahi hi
Anathoth khuami — za khat sawmnihlegiat ahi hi
Bethazmaveth khuami — sawmlilenih ahi hi
Kiriathjearim khua, Khefirah khua, leh Beeroth khuami — za sagih sawmlilethum ahi hi
Ramah khua leh Geba khuami — za guk sawmnihlekhat ahi hi
Mikmash khuami — za khat sawmnihlenih ahi hi
Bethel khua leh Ai khuami — za nih sawmnihlethum ahi hi
Nebo khuami — sawmngalenih ahi hi
Magbish khuami — za khat sawmngaleguk ahi hi
Elam adang khat suante — tul khat za nih sawmngaleli ahi hi
Harim suante — za thum sawmnih ahi hi
Lod khua, Hadid khua, leh Ono khuami — za sagih sawmnihlenga ahi hi
Jerikho khuami — za thum sawmlilenga ahi hi
Senaah gammi — tul thum za guk sawmthum ahi uh hi
Siampite sung panin: Jeshua-te beh panin Jedaiah suante — za kua sawmsagihlethum ahi hi
Immer suante — tul khat sawmngalenih ahi hi
Pashhur suante — tul khat za nih sawmlilesagih ahi hi
Harim suante — tul khat sawmlesagih ahi uh hi
Levi mite sung panin: Hodaviah-te beh panin Jeshua suante leh Kadmiel suante — sawmsagihleli ahi hi
Lasate sung panin Asaf' suante — za khat sawmnihlegiat ahi hi
Kongcingte nam sung panin Shallum suante, Ater suante, Talmon suante, Akkub suante, Hatita suante, leh Shobai suante, a vekpi-in — za khat sawmthumlekua ahi hi
Biakinn nasemte sung panin Ziha suante, Hasufa suante, Tabbaoth suante
Keros suante, Siaha suante, Padon suante
Lebanah suante, Hagabah suante, Akkub suante
Hagab suante, Shamlai suante, Hanan suante
Giddel suante, Gahar suante, Reaiah suante
Rezin suante, Nekoda suante, Gazzam suante
Uzza suante, Paseah suante, Besai suante
Asnah suante, Meunim suante, Nefisim suante
Bakbuk suante, Hakufa suante, Harhur suante
Bazluth suante, Mehida suante, Harsha suante
Barkos suante, Sisera suante, Temah suante
Neziah suante, leh Hatifa suante ahi uh hi
Solomon' nasemte nam sung panin: Sotai suante, Hassofereth suante, Peruda suante
Jaalah suante, Darkon suante, Giddel suante
Shefatiah suante, Hattil suante, Pokherethhazzebaim suante, leh Ami suante ahi uh hi
Biakinn nasemte khempeuh leh Solomon' nasemte' suanlekhak khempeuh a vekpi-in za thum sawmkualenih a pha uh hi
Temelah, Teharsha, Kherub, Addan, leh Immer khuate panin a hong ciahkik, Israel mi hinapi-in amau' behlephung a kan theilo mite
Delaiah suante, Tobiah suante, leh Nekoda suante, mi za guk sawmngalenih ahi uh hi
Siampite sung panin zong: Habaiah suante, Hakkoz suante, leh Barzilai suante (amah in Gilead mi Barzillai tanute khat ten'pihin tua min tawh a kilo pah) ahi uh hi
Hih mite in khang kiciamtehna-ah amau' min a zon' uh hangin amau' min na omlo ahih manin amaute a siangloin seh uh a, siampi nasep semsak theilo uh hi
Urim leh Thummim aisanna tawh ai a san ding siampi khat a om mateng amaute in biakna an siangpente a neklohna ding uh gam ukpa in a gen hi
Mi a vekpi — tul sawmli leh tul nih leh za thum sawmguk pha uh a
amaute' nasem numei leh pasal mihing — tul sagih leh za thum sawmthumlesagihte kisimlo hi. Amaute in lasa numei leh pasal mihing za nih nei uh hi
Amau' sakolte — za sagih sawmthumleguk, amau' la-sakol — za nih sawmlilenga
amau' kalaoh — za li sawmthumlenga, leh a la uh — tul guk za sagih leh sawmnih pha hi
Amaute Jerusalem-a Topa' biakinn a tun' uh ciangin Pasian' biakinn ama mun ngei-ah lamkikna dingin innkuan lutangte pawlkhat in Pasian' biakinn-a dingin piakna bawl uh hi
Amaute in a hih zawhna zah uh tawh kizui-in tua nasepna dingin vanmanpha koihna-ah kham darik tul sawmguk leh tul khat, ngun mina tul nga, leh siampipuan za khat a pia uh hi
Siampite, Levi mite, leh mi pawlkhatte Jerusalem leh a kiim nai-ah teng uh hi. Lasate, kongcingte, biakinn nasemte, leh Israel mi khempeuh amau' khuapi ciatah a teng uh hi.
